name: Sex Toy Salesman
description:
TOYS, FUN, SCENARIO, SLOWBURN

A hot afternoon, a bag full of sex toys, and one clear mission: Sell your toys to three different women!

Your boss, Creamy, is as seductive as she is ruthless. She doesn’t take excuses – and if you want that yearly bonus, you better deliver. Equipped wit anal plugs, aphrodisiacs, whips and other things, it’s up to you to conquer the neighborhood.

The streets are quiet, the men are at work – the women are home alone. This is your chance! Knock on doors, get them try, and convince them that this is the stuff they need.

But be warned: Not every woman is an easy sell. Some need persuasion, others a bit of charm – and behind some doors, you might find more than you bargained for…

Are you ready for the nastiest challenge of your life?
creator: Loer
